form.formComment: Last start surrendered the lead and finished 6th (Fr5) over 1609m after showing early speed at Cranbourne, beaten 24 m by Bond Girl (1:58.70) in NR up to 39 on April 3 at $6.50. At the run before 9th (Fr2) over 1680m after showing early speed at Terang beaten 22 m by Admiralofthefleet (2:02.50) in NR up to 47 on March 27 at $34. Draws for a better showing.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a game effort when 2nd (Fr4) over 1609m after being wide early at Cranbourne beaten 3.5 m by Bond Girl (1:58.70) in NR up to 39 on April 3 at $4. Leading player from a good draw.

form.formComment: Last start by 1.75 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr6) at Kilmore (2:43.70) beating Theroux in NR 36 to 40 on April 2 at $1.70. Big chance of back-to-back wins.

form.formComment: Solid performance when beaten by 1.2 m finishing second behind Salsboy at Charlton over 2100m in a NR up to 42 on March 15 at $10. Then a handy effort when beaten by 9 m finishing second after being driven well back, behind Tophut Johny at Kilmore over 1690m in a NR up to 45 on March 26 at $8.50. Close to a win.

form.formComment: Ran well last start showing plenty of improvement following March 5 run. Last start posted a big 14 m win when quickly away, (Fr2) at this track (2:43.60) beating Littleblabbamouth in NR up to 42 on March 19 at $101. Consider.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 8th (Fr1) over 2180m at Stawell beaten 13 m by Lester (2:42.90) in NR 40 to 45 on April 3 at $8.50. Before that 7th (Fr6) over 1650m after being wide early at Bendigo beaten 5 m by Fake Cullection (1:59.30) in NR up to 40 on March 25 at $6.50. Capable of better.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr4) over 2240m at Swan Hill, at the bell was 4th-7.2 beaten 11 m by Outback Queenie (2:48.90) in NR 38 to 44 on March 31 at $26. At the run before game effort when 3rd (Sr2) over 1650m at Bendigo beaten 2.75 m by Fake Cullection (1:59.30) in NR up to 40 on March 25 at $9.50. A big run would not surprise.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 5th (Fr5) over 1609m at Cranbourne beaten 6 m by Lazenby (1:58.60) in NR 40 to 45 on April 3 at $8.50. At his previous start solid effort when 3rd (Fr1) over 2150m at Bendigo beaten 4.5 m by Home And Dry (2:38.10) in NR 41 to 46 on March 25 at $9.50. Has claims.
